title: astragalus montis-bakhtiari
intro: Astragalus montis-bakhtiari is a species of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. It is a type of astragalus, which is commonly known as a "milk vetch," and is native to Iran. The medicinal properties of Astragalus montis-bakhtiari have been found to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may contribute to its potential health benefits. Traditionally, it has been used to prepare herbal supplements, teas, and infusions, which may aid in reducing stress, improving immune function, and promoting overall well-being.
